title: needhamiella
intro: Needhamiella is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its extracts and essential oils, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Needhamiella include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Needhamiella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
